title: Drunken Drummer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Drunken Drummer''' was a bar that was located on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] within the [[Corellian Sector (Nar Shaddaa)/Legends|Corellian sector]]. The tapcafe was often the hideout of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], including [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] on occasion while he lived on the Smugglers' Moon.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]''

==Sources==
